response.justification: The candidate is a broadly experienced, craftsmanship-oriented senior developer with strong web/full-stack and some high-performance systems background, but falls well short of the role's core requirements: the JD demands 8 years of C++, while the resume shows only a brief C/C++ stint (~7 months at National Instruments) plus a thesis project, with most systems work done in DLang. Large-scale infrastructure exposure exists (low-latency ad-tech microservices handling millions of requests/second) but spans roughly two years, and there is no demonstrated formal technical-leadership experience leading platform strategy or mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers at the level this role requires.
strengths: Real low-latency, high-throughput distributed systems experience at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic (millions of HTTP requests/sec)
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, plus active mentoring via workshops and courses
Broad polyglot experience (systems and full-stack) and self-driven platform ownership via GISCollective on Kubernetes
concerns: Far below the required 8 years of C++ — systems work is predominantly in DLang and TypeScript/Node.js
No formal technical-lead role owning platform strategy, cross-team alignment, or cloud/DevOps mentorship
Limited production cloud-architecture depth at platform scale; recent roles are product/full-stack rather than compute infrastructure

key_factors.factor: Lack of formal technical leadership experience
